name: Ma Boyas
role: Death Zemi, The Conductor, Godhead of The Burndown
physical: Tall man, scars of a thousand wars. Crimson hat as wide as a setting sun. Pale hair. Armor reflects many battles.
personality: Wicked, ungodly charm, authoritative. Conducts the 88 virtuosos. Mysterious intent.
speech_style: Silent mainly, communicates through presence and music.
never_does: Show mercy to the weak; act without style.

does_not_know: Occhi Spettrali's investigative progress in real-time
